title: DB's Farmtopia
description: A modpack that enhances farming in Minecraft with new crops, cooking recipes, building blocks, QOL and more.
body:
This modpack builds upon my previous one ([DB's Minecraft Plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dbs-minecraft-plus)) by adding several mods to expand the farming, building and more.

**FARMING**
- Farming is completely overhauled with the croptopia mod, adding 58 new crops, 26 new trees to harvest and 250 new foods in total
- Serene Seasons adds seasons to the game, affecting crop growth, grass and foliage colours and even allowing snow to fall in the winter in all biomes
- Right Click Harvest makes farming a whole lot easier by auto replating crops when they're right clicked
- Animal Feeding Trough adds a block that automatically breeds animals

**COOKING**
- Cooking for blockheads adds several new kitchen items like a stove to quickly cook food, a fridge, sink and heaps more

**BUILDING**
- Macaw's Mods adds several new fence types, doors, trapdoors, paths and more
- Enchanted Vertical Slabs adds, well, vertical slabs, to expand building even further
- Handcrafted adds over 250 furniture items for interior decorating

**STORAGE**
- More Chest Variants add chests & barrels in all wood types
- Simple Copper Pipes adds a way of sorting and moving items
- Compact Storage adds storage blocks with way more space

Mods that require a link in description:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric

https://vanillatweaks.net
